entities.name: dietary_preferences
observations: At least one soup and one vegetable dish per week
Avoid repeating categories on consecutive days

entities.name: weekly_menu_selections
observations: Monday: 可乐鸡翅 (Cola Chicken Wings) - meat
Tuesday: 水煮鱼 (Boiled Fish in Spicy Sauce) - seafood
Wednesday: 凉拌金针菇 (Cold Enoki Mushroom Salad) - vegetable
Thursday: 炒年糕 (Stir-fried Rice Cake) - staple
Friday: 奶油蘑菇汤 (Cream of Mushroom Soup) - soup
